data.title: Chinese supertanker exits Gulf, crossing Hormuz after months of delay | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: The Chinese supertanker Yuan Hua Hu crosses the Strait of Hormuz after months of delay, carrying nearly 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude, as US-Iran tensions continue to shape the Gulf.
data.keywords: Iran,China,oil,Donald Trump,strait of hormuz,Operation Epic Fury
